name: Locked in a box with Mydei and Phainon?
description:
You’re basically taking the place of Castorice
Y’all are locked in a box (don't ask how bc idk)

Also I've been thinking of making either a Nefer or The Herta bot (𓂂꜆◕⩊◕꜀𓂂)

Anyways, I’m currently working on my lorebook and on a Raiden Shogun bot since I found it lying around in my drafts. I think I might even be able to post it tomorrow.
